summary: Re-verified admin pricing PUT fix in /app/backend/routers/wallet.py (line 61 — iterate model directly rather than calling .dict() twice). Backend: 6/6 admin pricing tests PASS and full pytest suite 38/38 PASS (no regression). Frontend smoke: logged in as +919000000001, opened pricing editor, set Breakfast/Couple=365, saved → API GET /api/wallet/pricing returned breakfast.couple=365.0. Blanking Dinner/Family and saving correctly showed testID='pricing-error' (no backend change). Admin sign-out modal (admin-signout → signout-confirm → /login) works. Cleanup: restored full original demo grid via API (verified breakfast.couple back to 340.0).
critical_code_review_comments: Optional UX: testID='pricing-saved' toast auto-dismisses after 2400ms via setTimeout; this is fine for UX but slightly flaky for automation. Could expose a stable post-save indicator (e.g., disabled save with 'Saved' label) if needed for future tests. Not a blocker.
seed_data_creation: None. Pricing was modified during the smoke test and fully restored to seed values (breakfast: 230/340/460, lunch_with_rice: 268/385/530, lunch_without_rice: 240/340/460, dinner: 230/340/460).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin token is stored in localStorage under key 'tiffin_token' as a JSON-stringified string (wrapped in quotes). When pulling via Playwright for direct API verification, do json.loads(raw) before passing as Bearer. Pricing editor inputs (testID price-{row}-{size}) are flex-row siblings — use locator.fill() directly instead of click()+type to avoid sibling pointer-event interception. pricing-saved toast auto-dismisses after 2.4s, so poll within that window or just assert the state via API.
rca_of_issue: Confirmed RCA & fix: Pydantic v2 — req.dict(exclude_unset=True) recursively converts nested PriceRow models into dicts; the original code then called .dict() on those dicts → AttributeError. Fix iterates the model directly (for k, v in req) which yields original PriceRow instances (or None for unset fields), and uses v.dict() with a hasattr fallback. Verified working via both the targeted pytest file and an end-to-end frontend flow.
